name: Cheesy Scalloped Potates
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the peeled and cubed potatoes until tender.
2. Drain the boiled potatoes.
3. Add evaporated milk, soup, and chopped onions to the potatoes.
4. Cook until the onions are tender.
5. Add shredded cheddar cheese and cook over low heat until melted.
